info.description: REST API for managing Users, Groups, and Organizations with RBAC support
info.title: KitaManager API

get.description: Get a list of all children
Get a single child by their ID

put.description: Update an existing child by ID

get.description: Get all contracts for a child

post.description: Create a new contract for a child

get.description: Get the currently active contract for a child
Get a list of all employees
Get a single employee by their ID

put.description: Update an existing employee by ID

get.description: Get all contracts for an employee

post.description: Create a new contract for an employee

get.description: Get the currently active contract for an employee
Get a list of all groups
Get a single group by its ID

put.description: Update an existing group by ID

post.description: Add a group to an organization

delete.description: Remove a group from an organization

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password, returns JWT token

get.description: Get a list of all organizations
Get a single organization by its ID

put.description: Update an existing organization by ID

get.description: Get a list of all users
Get a single user by their ID

put.description: Update an existing user by ID

post.description: Add a user to a group

delete.description: Remove a user from a group

post.description: Add a user to an organization

delete.description: Remove a user from an organization

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
